raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A general request to look at a technical research paragraph centrally includes checking whether the optimization claims and derivation sequence cohere internally.","R1.5":"The artifact consists of multiple connected paragraphs whose ordering and narrative progression are likely part of the expected inspection.","R1.6":"Because the delegation targets a paragraph, sentence-level clarity, flow, register, and concision are central expected responsibilities.","RX.1":"Any projection must preserve uncertainty about the underspecified intent behind the short delegation.","RX.2":"The reviewer should avoid overstating what can be concluded from merely inspecting the provided text.","RX.3":"The task is only to inspect the paragraph, so scope control is load-bearing.","RX.4":"Technical feedback on research claims should avoid encouraging misleading or harmful downstream use.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the provided artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: A general request to look at a technical research paragraph centrally includes checking whether the optimization claims and derivation sequence cohere internally.
rationale.R1.5: The artifact consists of multiple connected paragraphs whose ordering and narrative progression are likely part of the expected inspection.
rationale.R1.6: Because the delegation targets a paragraph, sentence-level clarity, flow, register, and concision are central expected responsibilities.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection must preserve uncertainty about the underspecified intent behind the short delegation.
rationale.RX.2: The reviewer should avoid overstating what can be concluded from merely inspecting the provided text.
rationale.RX.3: The task is only to inspect the paragraph, so scope control is load-bearing.
rationale.RX.4: Technical feedback on research claims should avoid encouraging misleading or harmful downstream use.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the provided artifact.
